quiz_what_is_videocall_question: What do you need to make a video call?
quiz_what_is_videocall_explanation: For a video call you need: an internet connection, a camera (or a laptop with a built-in one), and an app like Viber, Skype, or Zoom. The other person must also have the same app.
quiz_what_is_videocall_opt_b: Internet, camera, and a video call app
quiz_videocall_tips_question: What is the best tip for a good video call?
quiz_videocall_tips_explanation: For a good video call: sit close to the router for stable internet, make sure you have light in front of you (not behind), and choose a quiet space. If the connection drops, simply call again.
quiz_videocall_tips_opt_c: Good lighting, stable internet, and a quiet space
module12_description: Explore gov.gr — use Google or AI to find what you're looking for
module12_lesson1_title: 1. How to Find a Service on gov.gr
module12_lesson1_desc: Use Google or an AI assistant to easily find government services
quiz_gov_intro_question: You want to renew your ID card online. What do you do?
quiz_gov_intro_explanation: The best first step is to ask Google or an AI assistant: 'How do I renew my ID card gov.gr'. They will guide you to the right page. Always check that the page belongs to gov.gr.
quiz_gov_intro_opt_a: Browse gov.gr randomly until you find it
quiz_gov_intro_opt_b: Ask Google or AI: 'ID card renewal gov.gr'
quiz_gov_intro_opt_c: Go to the citizen service center without searching online

module13_description: Meet AI assistants — what they do, how to ask questions, and when you need them
module13_lesson1_desc: Discover ChatGPT, Claude and other AI assistants
module13_lesson2_desc: Type a question and see how the AI responds
module13_lesson3_desc: Use the microphone instead of the keyboard
module13_lesson4_title: 4. AI or Google? When to Use Which
module13_lesson4_desc: Learn when AI is useful and when to use Google
module13_lesson5_desc: AI can make mistakes — learn when to double-check
quiz_what_is_ai_question: What makes an AI assistant (e.g. ChatGPT) different from Google?
quiz_what_is_ai_explanation: Google shows you a list of websites. An AI assistant reads many sources and gives you an answer tailored to your question — like talking to someone very knowledgeable. You can even ask follow-up questions!
quiz_what_is_ai_opt_b: It gives a personalized answer, like a conversation
quiz_voice_input_question: How can you use voice input with an AI assistant?
quiz_voice_input_explanation: Most AI assistants have a microphone icon 🎤 next to the text box. Tap it, speak, and your words appear automatically. Very convenient if you find typing difficult!
quiz_voice_input_opt_b: Tap the microphone icon 🎤 and speak
quiz_ai_vs_google_question: You want to explain your blood test results in simple terms. What do you use?
quiz_ai_vs_google_explanation: AI assistants are ideal for explanations, advice, and complex questions. Google is better for 'where', 'when', and finding websites. For 'what does this mean' and 'how can I...' — AI is better!
quiz_ai_limitations_question: An AI assistant told you a medication has no side effects. What do you do?
quiz_ai_limitations_explanation: AI can make mistakes — sometimes it answers confidently even when it's wrong (this is called 'hallucination'). For important matters (health, legal, financial) always verify from official sources or experts.
quiz_ai_limitations_opt_a: Trust it immediately — AI knows everything
quiz_ai_limitations_opt_b: Check the package leaflet or ask a pharmacist
quiz_strong_password_question: Which is the most secure password?
quiz_strong_password_explanation: A strong password has at least 8 characters and combines uppercase, lowercase, numbers and symbols (!@#). Avoid birthdays, names and simple words.
quiz_2fa_explanation: Two-factor authentication (2FA) means that in addition to your password, you need a second verification — usually an SMS code sent to your phone. Even if someone steals your password, they still can't get in.
quiz_2fa_opt_a: Two different passwords for the same site
quiz_2fa_opt_b: Logging in from two devices simultaneously
quiz_2fa_opt_c: Password + confirmation via SMS or email
quiz_public_wifi_question: You're connected to the café's public WiFi. What is dangerous to do?
quiz_public_wifi_explanation: Public WiFi is not encrypted — other users may be able to 'listen' to your data. Avoid online banking and logging into important accounts. Browsing and YouTube are fine.
